title: Enable View Default, View, and Edit Permissions by person column, team, and/or person
excerpt:
Development Request Requirements 

Ability to set Default View by person, team, or person column indication, please.
Permissions to View Views by person, team, or person column indication, please.
Permissions to Edit Vie…

posts.author: mmerchat (Monica Merchat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Development Request Requirements

  • Ability to set Default View by person, team, or person column indication, please.
  • Permissions to View Views by person, team, or person column indication, please.
  • Permissions to Edit Views by person, team, or person column indication, please.

Potentially helpful, posts that seemed relate to me:

  • Ability to set default board view for user and restrict access to board views by user - Feature requests - monday Community Forum

  • Can we restrict members from seeing view? - Platform discussions - monday Community Forum

  • Restrict filters/Hide on a view - Platform discussions - monday Community Forum

  • Allowing User Restrictions/Access on Views - Feature requests - monday Community Forum

posts.author: dmac11 (Daniel McKenzie)
posts.cookedHtml: My organization is in need of this as well. We use the guest account type to share information externally on most of our boards. It is annoying to have to create whole new boards to prevent clients from seeing certain views. Having the ability to grant visibility permissions to a view and or column, would be very helpful.
